goals: Summarize the strongest published strategies and examples for engineer flavonoid production in yeast
Distill recurring bottlenecks and unresolved questions from the literature
Turn evidence synthesis into the next set of editable project decisions

project_context.project_goal: What are the key successful common strategies and examples in microbial flavonoid production? What are the latest improvement options / key challenges in the future?
project_context.focus_area: Literature synthesis, benchmark mapping, and open-question framing
starter_questions: What are the most successful reported strategies and benchmark examples for engineer flavonoid production in yeast production?
Which open questions, improvement levers, or recurring bottlenecks show up across recent work?
